message: Stage -1 drafted angle=0 v1 mode=cold-start status=completed
Derived the FWL target-plus-contamination row-space trichotomy and conditional Markov clean-window phase transition.
Integrated approved spectral-comparability, target-row-representation, and strict-threshold assumptions into the strict boundary retained-row phase-transition theorem.

Review boundary stage_0.5_to_0 routed to stage_neg1 (reject fast-path): case 6b + regression pattern (a) — both motivating conjectures admit producer-confirmed counterexamples across all three attempts; reviewer's terminal reject is conjecture-level (no flagship target remains), not a fixable derivation defect, so re-deriving on the same .tex would burn budget.

Review boundary stage_0.5_to_0 routed to stage_neg1 (reject fast-path): Case 6b (Stage 0.5 reject fast-path) + regression (a) — the reviewer's reject is conjecture-level: both headline results refute internal in-repo conjectures rather than a named published estimator/workflow, so the artifact cannot clear novelty_target=flagship under the negative-result rules. This is not a derivation slip a Stage-0 redo can fix on the same .tex; the conjecture choice itself is the defect.
